_meta.description: Character creation data tables for ChronoQueue. Import directly into game engine.

chronoknight.name: Chronoknight
chronoknight.description: A steadfast warrior who bends time to endure any battle. Equal parts offense and defense.
chronoknight.tip: Balanced fighter — good at everything, great at nothing. Ideal for learning the game.

timestomper.name: Timestomper
timestomper.description: Hits hard, moves fast, dies young. Maximum damage output at the cost of survivability.
timestomper.tip: High risk, high reward. You'll kill fast but need to watch your HP in harder zones.

epoch_mage.name: Epoch Mage
epoch_mage.description: Channels temporal energy into devastating magical attacks. Fragile but devastating.
epoch_mage.tip: Pure magical damage dealer. Your INT scales your weapon — look for wands and staves.

idlemaster.name: Idlemaster
idlemaster.description: The ultimate AFK hero. Fastest tick speed and built for efficient offline grinding.
idlemaster.tip: Best when you're not looking. High speed means more actions per second, even offline.

loot_gremlin.name: Loot Gremlin
loot_gremlin.description: Born lucky. Finds better items, crits more often, and turns every fight into a treasure hunt.
loot_gremlin.tip: Your LCK stat drives crit chance AND item rarity. You'll find the best gear in the game.

unflappable.name: Unflappable
unflappable.description: Nothing fazes this one. Massive HP pool turns every fight into a war of attrition — and they always win.
unflappable.tip: You won't die easily. Lower damage, but you can push into zones others can't survive.

weapon.name: Rusty Longsword
weapon.flavor: Dull but dependable. Like its owner.

armor.name: Worn Chainmail
armor.flavor: Held together by rust and stubbornness.

weapon.name: Cracked Greathammer
weapon.flavor: The crack adds character. And unpredictability.

armor.name: Ripped Vest
armor.flavor: More holes than fabric. Aerodynamic, arguably.

weapon.name: Chipped Wand
weapon.flavor: Crackles faintly. The tip glows if you believe hard enough.

armor.name: Threadbare Robe
armor.flavor: Smells like old library. Somehow comforting.

weapon.name: Dull Dagger
weapon.flavor: Light enough to swing without really trying.

weapon.name: Bent Fork
weapon.flavor: Found it on the ground. It was meant to be.

armor.name: Lucky Scarf
armor.flavor: Smells faintly of four-leaf clovers and stolen gold.

weapon.name: Battered Mace
weapon.flavor: Heavy. Blunt. Gets the job done eventually.

armor.name: Dented Breastplate
armor.flavor: Every dent is a fight survived. There are many dents.
